title: chiloglottis reflexa
intro: Chiloglottis reflexa, also known as the reflexed bird orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chiloglottis reflexa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Chiloglottis reflexa is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
